general.title: General
general.languageDescription: Select the display language for the application
general.themeDescription: Choose light, dark, or match your system setting
general.primaryDatabaseDescription: Default database for media search (TMDB or TVDB)
general.preferMediaLanguageDescription: Preferred language for media metadata/search. Leave unset to use app language.
general.enableMcpServerDescription: Run the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server on its own port for external clients
general.externalToolsDescription: Configure paths to external executable tools

ai.title: AI Settings
ai.description: Configure AI provider settings for media metadata processing
ai.noProviders: No AI providers configured. Click "Add Provider" to add one.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Share your feedback, report bugs, or suggest new features

githubIssues.title: GitHub · Report Bugs
githubIssues.description: Open GitHub Issues to report bugs.

githubDiscussions.title: GitHub · Feedback or Discussion
githubDiscussions.description: Open GitHub Discussions for feedback and questions.

gitcodeIssues.title: GitCode · Report issues (Mainland China)
gitcodeIssues.description: Open GitCode Issues (recommended in mainland China).

gitcodeDiscussions.title: GitCode · Discussions (Mainland China)
gitcodeDiscussions.description: Open GitCode Discussions (recommended in mainland China).

feedback.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your feedback in detail...

renameRules.title: Rename Rules
renameRules.description: Configure file renaming rules for media files
renameRules.emptyState: No rename rules configured. Click "Add Rule" to create one.
